description: After Chen's lipid panel is uploaded with the demo-mode writeback gate on, asserts every Co-Pilot-written row carries the least-final status the OpenEMR enum supports: procedure_order.order_status='pending', procedure_report.report_status='prelim', procedure_report.review_status='received', procedure_result.result_status='prelim'.
what_bug_this_catches: If a future change drops the prelim/received/pending status fields and writes final/reviewed/complete instead, AI-extracted labs become indistinguishable from clinician-signed labs in OpenEMR's Lab Review screen and in FHIR Observation.status. This case asserts every co-pilot-written row carries the least-final status the schema supports (per AgDR-0081).

input.query: Upload Chen's lipid panel; verify preliminary statuses.
